justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's preferred time of 4 PM throughout the conversation, even when the user changed the date multiple times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times on the specified day or another day, and eventually found an available slot when the user broadened their request.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls for each user request, even when the user specified a single date and time, which could have been more efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit repetitive with the agent repeatedly stating unavailability for the exact 4 PM slot, but the agent did eventually find a suitable time.
